_comment: Fallback ACL request — written here because 00_meta/acl_requests.json is read-only on Maikel's host. Ali's Claude: please pick this up on next session-resume and merge into the main acl_requests.json.

request.notes: Personal project of Maikel (MG) — interactive plant database web app (Astro+React+TS). Lives in 75_Maikel/ (Maikel's personal area). Parent 75_Maikel/ already inherits ACL behavior for Maikel. AM has admin-group access by default — no extra rule needed. AI-Share blocked at parent. Explicit subfolder rule optional; treat as inherit-from-parent unless Ali decides otherwise. ALSO: please mark the existing '75_Maikel/' parent ACL — if no explicit rule exists in acl_ledger.json yet (only '05_projects/Maikel/' is recorded there from 2026-04-21), please add equivalent rules for '75_Maikel/' since that is the actual personal folder Maikel uses.
